narrative:
Bowersville 400 (precinct in Greene County) has 139 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
